article_meta.title: President Donald Trump’s mass deportation operation is expected to ramp up in 2026 as newly hired military lawyers-turne

reasoning: The summary inherits some of the article’s loaded framing (e.g., “mass deportation operations,” “illegal immigrants,” and “only 6–8 weeks”) without distancing, though most language is otherwise neutral and opposing views are attributed. It includes critics’ claims with attribution and balances data points, but word choice occasionally mirrors the source’s rhetoric.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses phrases like “mass deportation operations” and “reduce options for illegal immigrants,” and “only 6–8 weeks,” which add interpretive tone.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Most claims are factual or attributed (e.g., Posse Comitatus concerns labeled as critics’ view; stats are presented as data).
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: “Mass deportation operations” and the evaluative “only” present subjective framing as fact in places.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Some charged phrasing appears but overall tone remains measured.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or ad hominem language.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about unobservable intentions or mental states.
custom_reasoning.slant: Includes both administrative actions and critics’ objections; slight tilt via loaded terms.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Summarizes both efficiency goals and criticisms; omits some pro-administration rationales/quotes but not majorly.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: “Only 6–8 weeks” introduces a value judgment; otherwise restrained.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Politically loaded terms like “illegal immigrants” and “mass deportation” used without distancing.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Mentions high denial rates and critics’ concerns but also includes backlog reduction and hiring; roughly balanced.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No systematic favoring of elite vs grassroots sources.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than the source in places, but replicates notable loaded phrases.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Represents administration actions and critics; data context included; some supporter framing (e.g., efficiency rationale) underdeveloped.
